title: Department Manager Vacancy at Star Bazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Star Bazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Star Bazaar! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Star Bazaar:
Star Bazaar is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Bazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
